name: codex-provider-sync-skill
description: Agent skill package for safely inspecting, syncing, and restoring Codex provider/session visibility metadata after provider changes.

interface.shortDescription: Repair Codex session visibility after provider switches
interface.longDescription: A safety-first Codex/Claude Code Skill package for using codex-provider-sync. It guides agents through status-first inspection, backup-aware sync, verification, and restore for rollout and SQLite provider metadata after model_provider/API/provider changes.
defaultPrompt: Use codex-provider-sync to inspect my Codex provider metadata
Use codex-provider-sync to repair old Codex sessions after switching provider
Use codex-provider-sync to explain whether I should run sync or restore
